vocab.meaning: tìm thấy niềm vui/sự thú vị từ việc gì đó
vocab.example: I really get a kick out of mountain biking because of the adrenaline rush it provides.
Joining the local drama club has been a barrel of laughs and a great way to meet like-minded people.

vocab.meaning: quên mất thời gian (thường do quá say mê)
vocab.example: Whenever I start painting, I completely lose track of time and can stay in the studio for hours.

vocab.meaning: nạp lại năng lượng (sau thời gian làm việc mệt mỏi)
vocab.example: Gardening is my preferred way to recharge my batteries after a long and taxing week at work.

vocab.word: have a whale of a time
vocab.meaning: có một khoảng thời gian cực kỳ vui vẻ
vocab.example: I had a whale of a time at the photography workshop last weekend; I learned so many new techniques.

vocab.meaning: rất đúng sở thích/sở trường của ai đó
vocab.example: Since I've always loved puzzles, escape rooms are right up my alley.

vocab.meaning: giảm bớt sự căng thẳng/khó chịu
vocab.example: Playing the piano really helps to take the edge off a stressful day and calms my mind.

vocab.meaning: trở nên cực kỳ say mê/đam mê thứ gì đó
vocab.example: I was bit by the travel bug in college, and now I spend all my savings on exploring new countries.

vocab.meaning: theo tốc độ/nhịp độ riêng của bản thân
vocab.example: I enjoy solo hiking because it allows me to explore the trails at my own pace without any pressure.

vocab.meaning: thỏa thích/cho đến khi thấy mãn nguyện
vocab.example: On Sundays, I usually head to the library and read historical novels to my heart's content.
